name: Fengyou Liu
taglines: "Making electrons do useless things — some more useless than others."
"I build things that nobody asked for."
"If it doesn't have a battery, I'm probably not interested."
"Building at the edge of hardware and sky."
"Powered by caffeine and a really long USB cable."
"I'm the guy who forgets to save before flashing."
bio: At some point I looked at a cool project and thought 'I could build that.' That was a mistake. I've been hooked ever since. Currently studying ECE at Princeton and making that same mistake over and over, just with better tools.
